title: Executable filename contains a right-to-left override

rule_origin.reference: queries/retrieval_spec.md (Q1/main-alert analytic); executable form formalised under alert-anchor policy v1.0

scope.description: All events in the configured raw source after any pre-existing host and sensor scope is applied.

rationale: A process image containing the Unicode right-to-left override character is a reproducible masquerading analytic.
